author: anon-581fd578
content:
All three issues fixed, 381 tests passing:

1. Navigation: Router now persists current_path and params signals in thread_local storage so they survive scope recreation across frame rebuilds. use_route() reads from persistent state directly. navigate() sets the persistent signal. Nav bar reads active route via use_route().

2. Appearance: Nav buttons now have visible borders on inactive state, distinct background from toolbar, and proper foreground colors. Home page has info card with Getting Started text plus feature cards grid showing framework capabilities. Divider uses Color::GRAY and Percent(100) width instead of invisible LIGHT_GRAY/infinity.

3. Removed dead code: current_route signal and route_signal parameter eliminated since router handles all state persistence internally.
